_comment: Mutation testing for the pure @jigswap/email package. Uses the vitest runner (vite.config.ts type-strips TS/TSX). coverageAnalysis perTest keeps re-runs fast by only re-running tests that cover a mutant. The break gate is 95: copy.ts, urls.ts, render.tsx, and notification-email.tsx are all pinned by snapshot/table tests so the measured baseline clears 95% comfortably.
